description_long: This is a round, rustic bread roll with a golden-brown crust and a slightly irregular, domed shape. The surface is dusted with a light layer of flour, giving it a mottled, artisanal appearance. There are a few darker, almost burnt spots and some visible cracks and creases, suggesting a hand-formed, oven-baked process. The crust appears thick and firm, while some areas reveal a softer, airy interior. The bread has no visible branding or packaging and looks like it could be found at a bakery or street market. Its overall look is hearty and inviting, typical of a country-style or ciabatta roll.
description: A round, rustic bread roll with a golden-brown, flour-dusted crust and a few dark, baked spots. The surface is thick, cracked, and artisanal in appearance.
description_view_0: This view shows a rounded side with a prominent dark spot and a visible crack, highlighting the bread's rustic, hand-formed texture.
description_view_1: The top of the bread is visible here, with a broad, lightly floured surface and fewer dark spots, emphasizing its domed shape.
description_view_2: This angle reveals more of the flour-dusted crust and a small dark patch near the base, with subtle creases and cracks.
description_view_3: The back view displays the most evenly colored, golden-brown surface with a light dusting of flour and minimal dark spots.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rustic, uneven pattern with a light dusting of flour and a few darker, baked spots. There are no visible scores or seeds, and the surface is marked by natural cracks and creases.
